events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario. Task: identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Setting manufacturing floor, VFDs & motor controls, rough-complete, observed condition: missing load reactor on long motor leads. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Missing load reactor on long motor leads is a defect/non-compliance per NEC 430 and manufacturer manuals. Decision fail. Risk? Missing load reactor can cause reflected waves, motor insulation damage, bearing currents, premature failure; potential high? Not immediate safety critical but equipment damage and downtime. Risk high maybe. Work_stage rough-complete. Component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. findings: missing load reactor on long motor leads; VFD output not protected against voltage spikes/reflected waves for long cable run; non-compliance with manufacturer installation requirements. actions: install properly sized load reactor (dv/dt filter) at VFD output per manufacturer and NEC 430; verify motor lead length and reactor rating; inspect motor insulation rating. rationale: long motor leads from VFD require load reactor/dv/dt filter to limit voltage spikes and reflected waves; absence is installed-defective and non-compliant. references: NEC 430 (motor circuit requirements), VFD manufacturer manuals/installation instructions. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
